---
title: Detroit Become Human
author: Raphaële Slimane
image: https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784557517/detroit_20211024_gvymhk.png
description: Detroit Become Human
categories: ["generalillustration"]
date: 2021-10-24
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

![]( https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784557517/detroit_20211024_gvymhk.png)


::: {.visually-hidden}
{{< meta description >}}
:::
